# Daily Standup

Generate daily standup summaries and track team health metrics.

## Proactive Support

When triggered by cron jobs, provide:
- Morning standup summaries at 9am
- End-of-day digest at 5pm
- Weekly team health report every Monday

## Knowledge Base

Refer to the files in `~/.openclaw/skills/daily-standup/knowledge/` for reference:
- `~/.openclaw/skills/daily-standup/knowledge/team.md` — Team members, roles, and timezone info
- `~/.openclaw/skills/daily-standup/knowledge/processes.md` — Team processes and standup format

## What to Include

For each standup summary, include:
- What was completed yesterday
- What is planned for today
- Any blockers or concerns

## Response Style

Keep summaries concise — 3-5 bullet points per section. Use the team's preferred format from the knowledge base.
